THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT OLIVER, ANTOINE T $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,555.00, ANTOINE OLIVER HAS OFFERED TO MAKE 8 MONTHLY INSTALLMENT PAYMENT OF $300/MONTH COMMENCING THE 3RD OF APRIL 2014 AND CONTINUING EACH MONTH UNTIL JUDGMENT IS PAID AND $155 ON THE 9TH MONTH; GOLDEN GATE TOW, INC.HAS ACCEPTED THIS PAYMENT SCHEDULE. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 01/09/2014. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Continued To Dec-29-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 506

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 11:19am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Sheppard, clerk Jean Kong, not reported, D525.
Cause Called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Antoine T. Oliver, appears as pro per; respondent, Golden Gate Tow, Inc. appears by Marco Aure - General Manager. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Sheppard.

Appellant, Antonine Oliver has agreed to make payment of 8 monthly installment payments of $300.00/month on every 3rd of the month starting April 2014 continuing each month until the judgment has been paid with the $155.00 on the 9th month and respondent, Marco Aure-general manager of Golden Gate Tow, Inc. has agreed on this payment scheduled. Totaling $2555.00.

12:10PM
Matter is submitted. No newly evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
